h1: Elevate Your Living Space with Heat & Glo Fireplaces and Samsung Frame TV
h2: Dark Blue Fireplace In The Bedroom? Yes, Please!
Enhance Your Fireplace Makeover with a Gas Insert

paragraphs: Creating a warm and inviting living space is essential for any home, and a fireplace can make all the difference. Heat & Glo fireplaces are industry-leading for our advanced technology, high-quality craftsmanship, and beautiful designs. When paired with the Samsung Frame TV, they create a seamless blend of warmth, style, and innovation. The image above displays a Supreme indoor gas fireplace insert from Heat & Glo under the Samsung Frame.

Heat & Glo fireplaces are designed to enhance any home with their wide range of styles, including gas, electric, and wood-burning models. Each fireplace is crafted with meticulous attention to detail and built to last, providing both aesthetic appeal and reliable performance.What truly sets Heat & Glo apart is our advanced heat management technology. This technology allows homeowners to enjoy the ambiance of a fireplace, such as the Primo II pictured above, without worrying about excessive heat buildup, making it ideal for pairing with other home electronics like the Samsung Frame TV.

The Samsung Frame TV is a unique television that transforms into a piece of art when not in use. Its sleek design and ability to display artwork make it an excellent complement to a Heat & Glo fireplace like the Slimline 7X with Tranquil Greige Refractory Brick. When you mount the Frame TV above a Heat & Glo fireplace, the pairing creates a stunning focal point in any room, combining the warmth and charm of a fireplace with the modern sophistication of a high-tech TV.

Heat & Glo's heat management technology ensures that the TV is protected from heat, allowing it to be safely placed above the fireplace. This setup maximizes the aesthetic appeal of the room while maintaining a safe and comfortable environment for everyone. Heat & Glo's heat management technology ensures that the TV is protected from heat, allowing it to be safely placed above the fireplace. This setup maximizes the aesthetic appeal of the room while maintaining a safe and comfortable environment for everyone.

Heat & Glo fireplaces such as the Mezzo with our innovative heat management technology and stylish designs, are the perfect addition to any home. When paired with the Samsung Frame TV, they create a harmonious blend of function and aesthetics, enhancing the beauty and comfort of your living space. Create the space of your dreams today and request a consultation to get started.

The Mezzo linear gas fireplace features one of the cleanest designs in the industry, punctuated by end-to-end ribbon flames. A wide range of sizes and styles help make Mezzo yours – including trendy fire bed materials and timeless log sets – and heat-management options so you can enjoy the beauty of this linear fireplace near your TV. Available in 36-inch, 48-inch, 60-inch and 72-inch widths.

With big flames and classic style, the Supreme gas fireplace insert gives your old, cold fireplace a beautiful makeover. Choose from the widest variety of logs and interior styles to get the look you love. Gathering around a roaring fire has never been easier thanks to this low-maintenance fireplace insert. Available in 25, 30 and 35-inch widths.
Make the most of your space with the most fireplace for a slender 16” profile. The popular SlimLine gas fireplace is ideal for nestling into tight spots and adding extra comfort to your couch time.

Create a fireside experience that complements your sleek style. Built-in heat management makes it safe to install your TV above this fireplace. Tailor it to your interior design style by choosing from a range of interior panels, fire bed materials, and hand-painted logs. Available in 48-inch, 60-inch and 72-inch widths.
Design a wall that’s straight fire with a gas linear fireplace.
See how designer Emily Henderson combined a cozy aesthetic with a modern gas fireplace in this bedroom reveal.
Lauren and Kameron from LKS Address transformed their wood-burning fireplace into a modern, efficient, and convenient Heat & Glo gas insert - perfect for year-round use in their 90s colonial home.
Browse our photo gallery to find a fireplace design that reflects your unique style.
